title: vernonia longipedunculata var. retusa
intro: Vernonia longipedunculata var. retusa, also known as a variant of the Vernonia longipedunculata plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Vernonia longipedunculata var. retusa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against microbial infections. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
